About

Built on trust since 2000.

JACKFRUIT CO. stands on over two decades of sourcing and manufacturing discipline, aligning buyers with proven factory ecosystems and execution teams that deliver with consistency.

Established

0

Experience

0+ yrs

EU MarketUK MarketUSA Market

What We Do

Sourcing, development, production, and logistics under one accountable structure.

We support both emerging and established labels with structured sourcing, development, and production management across knit, woven, denim, and home-textile programs.

Core Statements

  • Factory placement through established, export-ready production partners
  • Clear order flow from enquiry, development, and approvals to shipment
  • Dedicated buyer communication with weekly execution visibility
  • Sampling and approval tracking to lock fit, quality, and construction
  • Production planning, critical-path monitoring, and risk anticipation
  • Quality assurance and shipment oversight with documented checkpoints

Product Coverage

Circular knit garmentsKnitwear and sweatersWoven apparelTowels and bed linen

Services

A complete operating model from concept alignment to on-time delivery.

Sourcing & Merchandising

  • - Global material sourcing
  • - Transparent costing architecture and negotiation
  • - Continuous execution follow-up with factory teams
  • - Disciplined shipment and handover management

Design & Product Development

  • - Buyer-specific styling support
  • - Global trend and market direction research
  • - Fabric, trim, and construction development
  • - Collection planning support by season and price architecture

Production & Quality Assurance

  • - End-to-end production monitoring
  • - In-line, mid-line, and final quality inspections
  • - Alignment to international quality benchmarks
  • - T&A scheduling discipline with milestone control

Cost Re-Engineering

  • - Design-to-cost strategy and option mapping
  • - Value-engineering routes without quality erosion
  • - Strategic factory allocation by product complexity
  • - Cost optimization while retaining brand standards

Audits & Compliance

  • - Social and ethical audit readiness support
  • - Workplace safety monitoring
  • - Regular factory vetting and compliance checks
  • - Corrective-action follow-through and closure tracking

Shipping & Logistics

  • - End-to-end logistics coordination
  • - Freight planning and booking alignment
  • - Export documentation management
  • - Shipment milestone tracking

Production Process

Structured for consistency, monitored at every stage.

Experience

0+ years

Founded in 2000 with sustained sourcing and production leadership across categories.

Network Capacity

0+ pcs/month

Network-based monthly output built to support international program demand.

Minimum Order

0 pcs/style

Flexible entry quantity starting from 300 pieces per style.

AQL Inspections

0 stages

In-line, mid-line, and final AQL checkpoints to protect consistency.

Product Categories

Flexible category support with clear MOQ expectations.

Circular Knit Garments

MOQ: From 300 pieces per style

  • - T-shirts
  • - Polo shirts
  • - Sweatshirts
  • - Hoodies
  • - Rugby shirts
  • - Jog pants and jog shorts
  • - Pyjamas and knit loungewear

Knitwear & Sweaters

MOQ: From 800 pieces per style

  • - Sweaters
  • - Pullovers
  • - Cardigans
  • - Jumpers

Woven Garments

MOQ: From 800 pieces per style

  • - Shirts and blouses
  • - Trousers and chinos
  • - Jackets
  • - Shorts

Denim

MOQ: From 800 pieces per style

  • - Denim jeans
  • - Denim jackets
  • - Denim skirts and shorts

Home Textiles

MOQ: Flexible MOQ

  • - Towels
  • - Bed linen
  • - Bedsheets
  • - Duvet covers
  • - Pillowcases

Values

Principles that shape every production decision.

01

Integrity

Trust is protected through transparent communication, accurate reporting, and responsible execution.

02

Collaboration

We operate as a practical extension of your team across development, production, and delivery.

03

Accountability

Every commitment is measured, tracked, and owned from first enquiry to final shipment.

04

Customer Focus

Buyer goals, quality standards, and delivery windows remain central to every decision we make.

Our Partners

Trusted by leading global brands.

Contact

Let's develop your next production program.

Share your category focus, quality expectations, and target timeline. We will map sourcing, development, production, and shipment with transparent milestones from start to finish.

Email: ajmain@jackfruitco.co.uk

Response usually within 24 hours.
